title: Feature: Quality Loop — compile, test, hex analyze, fix until Grade A
description: Replace single-pass validate with iterative quality loop: compile check → test runner → hex analyze → auto-fix → retry until Grade A (score >= 90, zero violations).

phases.name: Fix Analyze Endpoint
phases.description: Make hex analyze work via REST for any directory

phases.name: Quality Gates
phases.description: Add compile check, test runner, and grade calculation

phases.name: Integration
phases.description: Wire into pipeline, TUI, and report

steps.description: Fix hex analyze REST endpoint. Currently GET /api/analyze returns 405. Add POST /api/analyze with { path: string } body that runs architecture analysis on any directory (including examples/<app>/). Return JSON: { score, grade, violations[], dead_exports[], circular_deps[], files_analyzed, import_rules_checked }.

Add compile check to validate phase. Detect language from workplan (rust/typescript). Run tsc --noEmit --strict (TS) or cargo check (Rust) in the output directory. Parse compiler output. Return CompileResult { pass: bool, errors: Vec<CompileError> } with file, line, message per error.

Add test runner to validate phase. Run bun test or cargo test in the output directory. Parse test output for pass/fail counts. Return TestResult { pass: bool, passed: u32, failed: u32, output: String }. Skip if no test runner configured.

Add grade calculation. Parse hex analyze JSON response into AnalyzeResult { score, grade, violations, dead_exports, circular_deps }. Grade mapping: A (90-100), B (80-89), C (70-79), D (60-69), F (0-59). Grade A = score >= 90 AND zero boundary violations.

Add fix prompt templates: fix-compile.md (compiler error + source → fixed source) and fix-tests.md (test failure + source + test → fixed source/test). Add to hex-cli/assets/prompts/. These use DeepSeek R1 (reasoning) since fixing requires understanding the error.

Implement retry loop in validate_phase.rs. Run quality gates in order: compile → test → analyze. On failure, call inference with appropriate fix prompt, apply fix, retry. Max 3 iterations per gate. Return QualityResult { grade, iterations, compile_pass, test_pass, analyze_score, fix_cost_usd, fixes_applied }.

Wire quality loop into hex dev headless and TUI modes. Replace current single-pass validate with the quality loop. In headless: print per-iteration results. In TUI: show compile/test/analyze status with live updates. Gate on Grade A in interactive mode, Grade B minimum in auto mode.
Update hex report to show quality loop details: iterations count, final grade, compile status, test pass/fail counts, architecture score, violations fixed, fix cost. Add to both text and JSON output.

Generate minimal project scaffold in output directory before code phase: package.json with test script (TS) or Cargo.toml (Rust), tsconfig.json (TS). This ensures compile check and test runner have something to work with.
